title: deroemera calva
intro: Deroemera calva is a genus of flowering plant, belonging to the family Berberidaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Japan. The plant contains berberine, a compound with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat various health conditions. Deroemera calva has been traditionally used to treat fever, diarrhea, and gastrointestinal issues, and its berberine content also exhibits antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the root of the Deroemera calva plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
